Created attachment 246338
patch to update www/rss-brigde from 2023-07-13 to 2023-09-24 (to apply via git am)

Hi.

New release of rss-bridge is out, so here's the patch to update the port.

Poudriere checks passed, portlint -A shows no errors.

Spotted by portscout.

Thanks.
